violations.text: Menu lacks an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024

Raw animal foods (such as pooled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as cooked foods) in the prep unit and 1 door unit. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. PIC relocated pooled eggs. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took unit out of service (Out of Order sign) to be washed/sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was less than 200 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-400 ppm. PIC added additional sanitizer and retested. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026

Home fries were observed held at 100 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC reheated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026

Pooled eggs, potatoes, and eggs in shell were observed held between 52-64 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC added more ice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026

Various items were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026

The presence of rodents are not controlled as evidenced by droppings in the back storage areas. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026
Various items were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen and back storage area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026

Wood is used in the construction of shelf above cooking area in kitchen. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: - freezer units (ice buildup) - shelves in kitchen (debris) New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026

The following was observed in poor repair: - Ceiling tiles in customer restroom (previous water damage) - Floor/wall coving in kitchen area (peeling off wall)The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2026
The ceiling in the kitchen area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2026

The floors and walls in the kitchen area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026

The walls in the mops sink are constructed of dry wall. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024

The presence of (rodents) is not controlled as evidenced by (droppings in the kitchen floors, food storage shelves, and back storage area). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024

The floors throughout the kitchen and/or under equipment have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and/or grease buildup. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2024

The ceilings and ceiling vents in the kitchen area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2024
Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024

Eggs, liquids eggs, and chopped spinach was observed held at (54-57 ) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2024

The presence of (rodents) is not controlled as evidenced by (droppings in the kitchen floors, food storage shelves, and back storage area). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024

The refrigerator in located in the (kitchen) area was not in good repair. Ambient temperatures observed at 57DF.PIC informed. Establishment not allowed to store any TCS food in unit until repaired/replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2024

The wall in the kitchen area is in poor repair. Inspector observed holes in wall exposing wood and drywall. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2024

The ceiling and ceiling vents in the (kitchen) area has an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2024
Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024

Various food product was observed held at (45-55) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC voluntarily disposed of food. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of cook, cooked potatoes was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep.PIC informed of proper cooling procedures. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024

Thermometers are lacking in the refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings in the back storage area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024

The following equipment observed in poor repair: 1.1 dr refrigerator located in kitchen ambient temperature was 55DF and exposed insulation on the interior door. 2.1 dr refrigerator in back storage area ambient temperature was 46DF. 3.1 dr Counter refrigerator in the back storage area ambient temperature 48DF. 4.counter refrigerator in servers station ambient temperature 59DF. 5.cold water handle on handsink is missing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the food storage shelves have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2024

The walls in the back storage area are constructed of wood. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2024
The floors in back storage area is in poor repair. ripped/missing laminate flooring. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2024
